task.name: Add items-start to Tier 2 filter grid
task.action: In `src/components/reports/TransactionAnalyzer.tsx`, find the grid container at line 476: ``` className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-3 md:gap-4" ``` Change it to: ``` className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-3 md:gap-4 items-start" ``` This ensures both columns align to the top when tag pills increase the Tags column height.
task.verify: Open TransactionAnalyzer in a desktop viewport. Select 1+ tags so pills appear below the Tags field. Verify the Account label and dropdown stay vertically aligned with the Tags label and button (not pushed down). Run `npm run build` to confirm no errors.

task.name: Update bottom padding on all pages with existing pb-20
task.action:
In every file listed below, find all occurrences of `pb-20 md:pb-6` and replace with `pb-24 md:pb-6`. Some files have multiple render paths — update ALL occurrences in each file.
Files: - `src/app/dashboard/page.tsx` (1 occurrence) - `src/app/accounts/page.tsx` (1 occurrence) - `src/app/accounts/[id]/page.tsx` (3 occurrences) - `src/app/budgets/page.tsx` (1 occurrence) - `src/app/cards/page.tsx` (1 occurrence) - `src/app/cards/[id]/page.tsx` (4 occurrences) - `src/app/cards/groups/[groupName]/page.tsx` (4 occurrences) - `src/app/expenses/page.tsx` (1 occurrence) - `src/app/income/page.tsx` (1 occurrence) - `src/app/reports/page.tsx` (1 occurrence) - `src/app/settings/page.tsx` (1 occurrence) - `src/app/transactions/page.tsx` (1 occurrence)
task.verify: Run a global search for `pb-20` in `src/app/**/page.tsx` — there should be zero matches (except auth pages which use `pb-6`). Run `npm run build` to confirm no errors.

task.name: Add bottom padding to pages missing it
task.action:
In `src/app/transfers/page.tsx`, find the root container div (line 67): ``` className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 md:px-8 pt-0 flex flex-col" ``` Change to: ``` className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 md:px-8 pt-0 pb-24 md:pb-6 flex flex-col" ```
In `src/app/more/page.tsx`, find the root container div (line 24): ``` className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 pt-0 flex flex-col" ``` Change to: ``` className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 pt-0 pb-24 md:pb-6 flex flex-col" ```
task.verify: Open both `/transfers` and `/more` pages on a mobile viewport (less than 768px). Scroll to the bottom — content should not be hidden behind the BottomBar. Run `npm run build` to confirm no errors.

task.name: Add client-side truncation to CategoryBreakdownChart
task.verify: Open Reports page on Expenses tab for a month with more than 10 expense categories. Verify: - Only 10 items show in the breakdown list initially - Pie chart and legend grid still show all categories - "Show More (N remaining)" button appears below the list - Clicking it reveals all items and button text changes to "Show Less" - Clicking "Show Less" collapses back to 10 - Switching months or tabs resets to collapsed state Run `npm run build` to confirm no errors.

task.name: Add keepPreviousData to useTransactionAnalysis hook
task.action:
In `src/hooks/useTransactionAnalysis.ts`:
1. Update the import to include `keepPreviousData`: ```ts import { useQuery, keepPreviousData } from "@tanstack/react-query"; ```
2. Add `placeholderData: keepPreviousData` to the useQuery options (after `refetchOnWindowFocus: false`).
3. Destructure `isPlaceholderData` from useQuery: ```ts const { data, isLoading, isFetching, error, refetch, isPlaceholderData } = useQuery({...}); ```
4. Add `isFetchingMore` to the return object: ```ts return { data: data ?? null, isLoading, isFetching, isFetchingMore: isFetching && isPlaceholderData, error: error ? (error as Error).message : null, refetch, }; ```
task.verify: Run `npm run build` to confirm no type errors. The hook changes are backward-compatible — existing consumers still work.

task.name: Refactor TransactionAnalyzer to use displayCount pattern
task.verify: 1. Open TransactionAnalyzer, select filters, click "Analyze". 2. Verify results appear correctly (summary, breakdown, transaction list). 3. Click "Load More" — existing results must stay visible with skeleton placeholders below them. 4. New results append smoothly when loaded. 5. Click "Clear Filters" — results clear, analyze again works fresh. 6. Run `npm run lint` — zero errors. 7. Run `npm run build` — zero errors.
